title: Fix terminal OAuth timeout and type annotation

log.context: Fix terminal OAuth timeout and type annotation

Both fixes applied and pushed (commit `2c98eda`).

**Fix 1 — `/mnt/data/terminal/server.py`:**
- Added `import aiohttp` alongside the existing `from aiohttp import web, ClientSession`
- Changed `ClientSession()` to `ClientSession(timeout=aiohttp.ClientTimeout(total=10))` in `github_callback_handler` (line 144), scoping the 10s timeout to the OAuth flow only. The WebSocket relay session at line 1319 was left unchanged since a hard timeout there would kill long-lived terminal connections.
